title: Executor: Use errors.As instead of type assertion
description: Direct type assertion misses wrapped errors. File: internal/executor/executor.go:92-95. Use errors.As for future-proof error checking.

title: CLI: Remove global doctor result state
description: Global mutable state. File: cmd/dot/doctor.go:28. Return result through error/return mechanism instead.

title: Planner: Handle os.UserHomeDir error
description: Error silently ignored. File: internal/planner/validate.go:12. UserHomeDir error is ignored with _, should return error or handle gracefully.

title: Doctor: Consider functional options for OrphanCheck
description: Constructor complexity. File: internal/doctor/check_orphan.go:25-38. Constructor has 5 parameters, consider functional options.

title: API: FileInfo.ModTime returns any instead of time.Time
description: FileInfo interface breaks stdlib compatibility. File: internal/domain/ports.go:33-40. ModTime() returns 'any' but should return time.Time to match os.FileInfo.

title: API: Add struct-level documentation for Issue
description: Missing documentation. File: pkg/dot/diagnostics.go:46. Add godoc for exported Issue struct.

title: Planner: Preallocate result slice in TopologicalSort
description: Minor optimization. File: internal/planner/topo.go:21. Preallocate based on graph size.

title: Config: Add nolint comments for BindEnv calls
description: 47 BindEnv errors ignored. File: internal/config/loader.go:274-320. Add //nolint:errcheck with justification.

title: Doctor: Remove unused packages field
description: Unused field. File: internal/doctor/checks_conflict.go:17-18. Either implement filtering or remove the field.

title: API: Return typed ErrConflict instead of plain error
description: ManageService returns plain error for conflicts. File: pkg/dot/manage_service.go:80. Consumers cannot programmatically detect conflict errors.

title: Security: Path Join bypasses validation
description: Path Join method allows path traversal attacks. File: internal/domain/path.go:107-109. The Join method bypasses validation allowing sequences like '../../../etc/passwd'.
close_reason: Implemented JoinSafe method with path traversal validation. Commit 6e8109a.

title: CLI: Document duplicate flag definitions
description: Confusing aliases. Files: cmd/dot/unmanage.go:82, config.go:105-106. Document --yes/--force aliasing more clearly.

title: Domain: Replace custom As helper with errors.As
description: Test helper. File: internal/domain/path_validators_test.go:271. Use stdlib errors.As instead of custom implementation.

title: CLI: Extract context null-check helper
description: Repeated pattern. Files: cmd/dot/*.go. Extract getContext(cmd) helper or set context in PersistentPreRunE.

title: Ignore: Handle errors in NewDefaultIgnoreSet
description: Errors from Add() ignored. File: internal/ignore/ignoreset.go:16-23. Return error or add nolint comment with justification.

title: Domain: Remove deprecated Context type alias
description: Deprecated type should be removed. File: internal/domain/diagnostic.go:63-66. The Context type alias is deprecated and creates technical debt.

title: CLI: Replace deprecated strings.Title
description: Deprecated function. Files: cmd/dot/unmanage.go:285, internal/cli/output/format.go:29. Use cases.Title from golang.org/x/text/cases.

title: Scanner: Use map for reserved names lookup
description: Linear search inefficient. File: internal/scanner/reserved.go:8-12. Use map for O(1) lookup instead of linear search.

title: Doctor: Split large FS interface
description: Interface too large (10 methods). File: internal/doctor/interfaces.go:13-24. Split into FSReader and FSWriter.

title: Config: Remove unused getEnvWithPrefix function
description: Dead code. File: internal/config/loader.go:267-270. Function is never called, remove it.

title: Planner: Use slice instead of map for levels
description: Optimization. File: internal/planner/parallel.go:22-23. Contiguous integers can use slice for efficiency.

title: Add comprehensive API contract tests
description: pkg/dot/client_test.go only verifies client creation. Need tests for all public methods, error type assertions, and behavior guarantees.

title: Doctor: Use strings.Contains instead of reimplementing
description: Redundant code. File: internal/doctor/patterns.go:107-119. Use stdlib strings.Contains and strings.Index.

title: CLI: Consolidate duplicate pluralize functions
description: DRY violation. Files: cmd/dot/command_helpers.go:166-181, internal/cli/output/format.go. Consolidate to one location.

title: Executor: Add integration test for full rollback
description: Test gap. Create integration test that: creates plan, injects failure mid-execution, verifies complete rollback, verifies filesystem state restored.

title: Domain: Consider using stdlib fs.FileInfo and fs.DirEntry
description: Stdlib compatibility. File: internal/domain/ports.go. Consider using fs.FileInfo and fs.DirEntry from stdlib directly.

title: Domain: Add comment for ignored cleanup error
description: Ignored error needs justification. File: internal/domain/operation.go:473. Add comment explaining why cleanup error is ignored.

title: API: Consider builder pattern for optional bools
description: Config complexity. File: pkg/dot/config.go:149. Builder pattern would help distinguish unset vs false for bool options.

title: Pipeline: Document Parallel error handling behavior
description: Parallel doesn't cancel on first error. File: internal/pipeline/types.go:44-98. Document behavior or implement cancellation.

title: Updater: Fix misleading error assignment
description: Code clarity. File: internal/updater/startup.go:89-91. The _ = err assignment is misleading, simplify to just ignoring return.

title: Doctor: Standardize Result vs error return pattern
description: Inconsistent returns. File: internal/doctor/interfaces.go:28-29. ManifestLoader has mixed Result[T] and (T, error) patterns.

title: Domain: Fix Validate() returning ErrInvalidPath for non-path errors
description: Operation Validate methods return wrong error type. File: internal/domain/operation.go:127. Create ErrInvalidOperation or use appropriate error type.

title: Updater: Extract magic numbers to named constants
description: Code clarity. File: internal/updater/version.go:51-53. Extract timeout values to named constants.

title: CLI: Eliminate global mutable state (cliFlags)
description: Global mutable state creates test isolation issues. File: cmd/dot/root.go:43. The var cliFlags CLIFlags creates race conditions and requires manual reset in tests.

title: API: Preallocate slice in doctor_service
description: Linter warning. File: pkg/dot/doctor_service.go:264. Preallocate issues slice.

title: Doctor: Consider typed SeverityLevel
description: Type safety. File: internal/doctor/secrets.go:195-207. Define typed SeverityLevel with Stringer interface.

title: Pipeline: Remove redundant context cancellation checks
description: Unnecessary checks. File: internal/pipeline/stages.go:229-255. Remove redundant checks when previous operation is guaranteed fast.

title: CLI: Handle Scanln error in upgrade
description: Error ignored. File: cmd/dot/upgrade.go:184. Check error from fmt.Scanln like config.go:588 does.

title: CLI: Fix prealloc warning in command_helpers
description: Linter warning. File: cmd/dot/command_helpers.go:229. Preallocate slice with expected capacity.

title: API: Hardcoded os.Stdin/os.Stdout bypasses abstraction
description: Client constructor hardcodes stdin/stdout. File: pkg/dot/client.go:129. The selector should be injected or configurable via Config.

title: API: Use Logger instead of direct stderr writes
description: Bypasses logging abstraction. Files: pkg/dot/clone_service.go:151-153, manage_service.go:119. Use injected logger.

title: Adapters: Fix MemFS thread-safety comment
description: Misleading comment. File: internal/adapters/memfs.go:15. Comment says not thread-safe but implementation IS thread-safe.

title: CLI: Add comments for ignored config errors
description: Silent error handling. Files: cmd/dot/manage.go:40, status.go:25,99, list.go:29, doctor.go:195. Add logging or comments explaining why errors are ignored.

title: CLI: Add graceful pprof server shutdown
description: No shutdown mechanism. File: cmd/dot/main.go:100. Use http.Server with context-based shutdown.

title: Doctor: Add comment for ignored fs.Remove error
description: Silent error. File: internal/doctor/checks_conflict.go:168. Add comment explaining why cleanup error is ignored.

title: Planner: Fix aliasing in WithContext/WithSuggestion methods
description: Fluent API methods modify shared data. Files: internal/planner/resolver.go:75-84, 177-186. Copy maps/slices before modifying to ensure immutability.

title: Doctor: Add comment for ignored ignoreSet.Add error
description: Silent error. File: internal/doctor/check_orphan.go:391. Add comment explaining why error is ignored.

title: Pipeline: Improve Filter error message
description: Generic error message. File: internal/pipeline/types.go:138. Use typed ErrFilteredOut error for better error handling.

title: API: Document valid values for PackageInfo.Source
description: Missing documentation. File: pkg/dot/status.go:11. Document what values Source field can have.

title: API: Document thread safety guarantees
description: Claim lacks documentation. File: pkg/dot/client.go:26. Document what synchronization exists for thread safety claim.

title: API: Consider type definitions over aliases in ports
description: Type aliases expose internal changes. File: pkg/dot/ports.go:1-52. Consider defining interfaces directly or using type definitions with adapters.

title: Increase doctor package test coverage
description: Coverage only 23.8%. Add tests for checks_core.go, checks_conflict.go, check_orphan.go, check_permission.go, check_platform.go.

title: API: Add Is/As implementations for clone errors
description: Clone errors lack sentinel values. File: pkg/dot/errors.go:69-129. ErrProfileNotFound, ErrBootstrapNotFound cannot be detected with errors.Is().

title: Domain: Split large FS interface into smaller interfaces
description: FS interface has 14 methods. File: internal/domain/ports.go:9-30. Split into FSReader and FSWriter for better testability and interface segregation.

title: Planner: Check Result before Unwrap calls
description: Unchecked Unwrap could panic. File: internal/planner/desired.go:147, resolver.go:234,248. Check IsOk() before calling Unwrap().
